chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4236 - رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي اَلشُّرْبُ فِي آنِيَةِ اَلْفِضَّةِ وَ اَلذَّهَبِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4236 - Sama'ah narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is not proper to drink from vessels made of silver and gold."
